creator: pav@FreeBSD.org
text:
Ok here's an idea - what if we stop inheriting CFLAGS from /usr/share/mk
and define our own in bsd.port.mk?

Then src people can mess around with HEAD without affecting us.

Is there a way to override sys.mk defined CFLAGS in our Makefile in a
way make.conf'ed CFLAGS are respected?

-- 
Pav Lucistnik <pav@oook.cz>
              <pav@FreeBSD.org>
MIPS: Meaningless Information Provided by Salesmen
